subcodes.first_line: O ye loved ones of God! In this divine Dispensation, wherein drops have, through the grace of God, been transformed into surging oceans, and atoms have risen to the zenith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی در این کور رحمانی که قطرات بفضل الهی موج دریا یافته و ذرات باوج
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
